meta.l2l_definition: L2L distance = 50% of the rolling ADR(20) computed from the 20 completed sessions before the evaluation day.
meta.win_definition: L2L Range Available when the day's high-low range (available_range = high - low) is at least the L2L distance. The call direction only categorizes the row; the range calculation is identical for bullish/long and bearish/short. Open is diagnostic context only, close is irrelevant. This is not open-to-target reach and not close-to-close accuracy.
meta.range_availability_note: daily OHLC confirms range availability, not intraday sequence
meta.reference_price_policy: The day's open is recorded as diagnostic context only; it is never an anchor. Availability is measured purely on the day's high-low range vs the L2L distance.

unsupportedInstruments.blocker: No supportable DXY/USD-index daily OHLC source is staged. If the OANDA account exposes a USD index instrument, stage it via backtester/importers/oanda/download_oanda_daily_ohlc.js --instrument=<name> and add it to this builder. Close-to-close research views remain unacceptable for intraday reach evidence.
